# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices-demo
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-sa
  namespace: microservices-demo
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: worker-sa
  namespace: microservices-demo
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-frontend-ingress
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-api
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-api
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: frontend
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-worker
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-api
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app: frontend
    app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
        app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        fsGroup: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: myregistry.example.com/frontend:1.2.3@sha256:abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10001
            runAsGroup: 10001
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          env:
            - name: BACKEND_API_URL
              value: "http://backend-api-service.microservices-demo.svc.cluster.local:8080"
            - name: NODE_ENV
              value: "production"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: cache-volume
              mountPath: /app/cache
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
        - name: cache-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 128Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    app.kubernetes.io/name: backend-api
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        app.kubernetes.io/name: backend-api
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10002
        runAsGroup: 10002
        fsGroup: 10002
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: myregistry.example.com/backend-api:2.0.1@sha256:fedcba0987654321fedcba0987654321fedcba0987654321fedcba0987654321
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10002
            runAsGroup: 10002
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          env:
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-api-secrets
                  key: db-password
            - name: DB_HOST
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: backend-api-config
                  key: db-host
            - name: WORKER_URL
              value: "http://worker-service.microservices-demo.svc.cluster.local:8080"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app: worker
    app.kubernetes.io/name: worker
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker
        app.kubernetes.io/name: worker
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: worker-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10003
        runAsGroup: 10003
        fsGroup: 10003
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: myregistry.example.com/worker:1.5.0@sha256:aabbcc1122334455aabbcc1122334455aabbcc1122334455aabbcc1122334455
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10003
            runAsGroup: 10003
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 150m
              memory: 192Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 400m
              memory: 384Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          env:
            - name: QUEUE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: worker-secrets
                  key: queue-password
            - name: QUEUE_HOST
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: worker-config
                  key: queue-host
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: backend-api-config
  namespace: microservices-demo
data:
  db-host: "db.microservices-demo.svc.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: worker-config
  namespace: microservices-demo
data:
  queue-host: "queue.microservices-demo.svc.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app: backend-api
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: backend-api
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: worker-service
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app: worker
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: worker
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-ingress
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/force-ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/use-regex: "false"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/configuration-snippet: |
      more_set_headers "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff";
      more_set_headers "X-Frame-Options: DENY";
      more_set_headers "X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block";
      more_set_headers "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains";
      more_set_headers "Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'";
      more_set_headers "Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin";
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/limit-rps: "50"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/limit-connections: "10"
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - app.example.com
      secretName: microservices-tls-secret
  rules:
    - host: app.example.com
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: frontend-service
                port:
                  number: 8080
          - path: /api
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: backend-api-service
                port:
                  number: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: frontend-pdb
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: backend-api-pdb
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: worker-pdb
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: frontend-hpa
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: frontend
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 6
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: backend-api-hpa
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: backend-api
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
